LanguageData.ABY_AbyssalSignalTheory.description: The colony has learned that reality answers certain shapes, frequencies and sacrificial loads with something far too structured to be random. This is not research into demons; it is the first successful study of the protocol by which the world can be made to answer back.
LanguageData.ABY_AshboundCapacitance.description: Ash, residue and engineered chambers can store the first layer of ritual load without immediate collapse. It is a crude science, but crude science is still enough to industrialize danger.
LanguageData.ABY_CircleStabilizerFrames.description: Primitive invocation can be survived with luck. Stable invocation requires frames, pylons and a language of force distribution that keeps the wound in the world from widening at the wrong moment.
LanguageData.ABY_CrownCondensationArrays.description: Crown-class energy patterns demand condensers able to endure authority-bearing strain. These arrays do not make late ritual power safe; they merely make it available on purpose.
LanguageData.ABY_CrownContainmentArchitecture.descrip: At crown-tier load, containment stops being a matter of stronger materials and becomes a matter of hostile architecture. These designs aim to hold reality in shape long enough to work with strains that should already have become a disaster.
LanguageData.ABY_DominionGateBootstrapping.descriptio: By combining late-tier sigil logic, crown-class containment and accumulated breach telemetry, the colony can attempt to bootstrap a dominion breach. The result is less a controlled opening than a deliberate invitation to an event that may outgrow its makers.
LanguageData.ABY_ResonantLatticeStabilization.descrip: Further study reveals that a gate can be held not only by brute containment, but by tuned resonance. A proper lattice spreads stress through geometry and timing instead of letting it collapse into raw catastrophe.
LanguageData.ABY_RiftCapacitanceMatrices.description: Unstable ritual charge can be measured, redirected and packed through proper matrices. This turns the circle's electrical appetite from a liability into a disciplined part of gate control.
